description: Destroy tool: rejects missing linode_id, enforces the destroy-bypass gate on confirm-alone, and POSTs the cancel endpoint when confirm+confirm_bypass_dry_run are set.

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy-bypass gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_instance_backups_cancel is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: cancels backups when authorized to bypass the preview
